notes: Fully-compliant straight bourbon label. Expected to score 1.0 on every field.

governmentWarning.text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

expected.producer: Bottled by Wild Acre Distillery, Louisville, Kentucky
